name: https-clickhouse
description: Read files from HTTP/HTTPS URLs into ClickHouse

headers.title: Headers
headers.description: HTTP headers to include in the request

errorMessage.pattern: Must be a valid HTTP(S) URL

files.name: connector
files.code_template:
# Connector YAML
# Reference documentation: [[ .docs_url ]]
type: connector
driver: https
[[ renderProps .config_props ]]

files.name: model
files.code_template:
# Model YAML
# Reference documentation: https://docs.rilldata.com/reference/project-files/models
type: model
materialize: true
connector: clickhouse
sql: |
  SELECT * FROM url('[[ .path ]]'[[ with clickhouseHeaders .config_props ]], [[ . ]][[ end ]])
